scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix services/barcode && npm install --prefix services/groceryListManager && npm install --prefix services/mealPlanner && npm install --prefix services/userManagement
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --prefix-colors "auto" --names "CLIENT,BARCODE,GROCERY,MEAL,USER" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix services/barcode" "npm run dev --prefix services/groceryListManager" "npm run dev --prefix services/mealPlanner" "npm run dev --prefix services/userManagement"
